title: Spheres & Ellipsoids
blurb: Building up one feature at a time on a field of 200 objects: plain spheres, then the same objects transformed into ellipsoids, then made reflective.

cards.title: Spheres
cards.desc: 200 diffuse spheres with soft self-shadowing - the starting point.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  3x3 anti-aliasing (9 rays/pixel)  -  up to 1 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 2.3 s

cards.title: Affine Ellipsoids
cards.desc: The same 200 spheres, each squashed into an ellipsoid by its own affine matrix. No reflection.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  3x3 anti-aliasing (9 rays/pixel)  -  up to 1 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 3.9 s

cards.title: Reflective Ellipsoids
cards.desc: The same 200 ellipsoids, now reflective - each mirrors its neighbors.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  3x3 anti-aliasing (9 rays/pixel)  -  up to 6 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 8.9 s
